title: Invictus
author: William Ernest Henley
content: “I am the master of my fate, I am the captain of my soul.”
action: Seize full control of your current outcome.

title: The Second Coming
author: W.B. Yeats
content: “Things fall apart; the centre cannot hold.”
action: Reinforce your core before the collapse.

title: Ozymandias
author: Percy Bysshe Shelley
content: “Look on my works, ye Mighty, and despair!”
action: Identify what will outlast your current labor.

title: If—
author: Rudyard Kipling
content: “If you can force your heart and nerve and sinew To serve your turn long after they are gone.”
action: Push through the fatigue; finish the task.

title: Ulysses
author: Alfred, Lord Tennyson
content: “To strive, to seek, to find, and not to yield.”
action: Refuse to stop until the target is hit.
